repair_log.issue: Initial BATCH-007 Playwright release spec used stale headings and ambiguous selectors.
repair_log.resolution: Aligned selectors to accessible page headings and scoped assertions to visible table rows, text, and complementary panels.

repair_log.issue: A stale dev server occupied port 3000 and caused the Playwright webServer gate to time out.
repair_log.resolution: Stopped the stale node listener on port 3000, reran build independently, then reran Playwright.
repair_log.validation: npm run build passed and npm run test:e2e passed

repair_status.reason: All BATCH-007 validation issues were repaired and release gates passed.

resolved_blockers_not_repairs.reason: Missing application scaffold was an initiation blocker, not a repair of a failed implementation.
resolved_blockers_not_repairs.resolution: Resolved by scaffolding the Next.js TypeScript application and validating BATCH-001 initial scope.
